title: Warm reindex
description: Given a database with tables, when I call warm(), all tables should proactively refresh without waiting for a query. When already fresh, warm is a no-op. Spec: features/cache/warm_reindex.feature

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Status: Starting Phase 4 cache/invalidation work. Did: Phase 3 complete and pushed. Next: review cache features + specs, outline implementation plan and gaps. Blockers: none.
